new_classes.label_en: Other wine (not PDO/PGI, not variety/vintage) in containers > 2 l and ≤ 10 l — other (CN 2204 22 93)
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Wein (ohne g.U./g.g.A., ohne Rebsorte/Jahrgang) in Behältnissen > 2 L bis einschließlich 10 L — anderer (KN 2204 22 93)
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes bearing neither a protected designation of origin (PDO/g.U.) nor a protected geographical indication (PGI/g.g.A.) and carrying no variety or vintage designation, presented in containers of more than 2 litres and not exceeding 10 litres; sub-classified by total dry extract as 'other' within CN subheading 2204 22, and distinct from semi-sparkling wines, PDO wines, PGI wines, and Tokaj wines at this container size level.
